title: Realism Enhance Pro
note: Phase-1 basic img2img placeholder. Current pipeline is LoadImage → VAEEncode → KSampler(denoise=0.35) → VAEDecode → SaveImage. No mask node, ControlNet, IPAdapter, Reference pipeline, refiner, or tiled detailer. Mask is uploaded for Photoshop placement only — it does not participate in ComfyUI generation. Visual effect may be minimal for textured surfaces. A dedicated realism-enhance workflow with higher denoise and/or conditioning pipelines is planned for a future phase.

defaults.prompt: photorealistic, high detail, natural skin texture, soft cinematic lighting, sharp focus, 8k
defaults.negativePrompt: cartoon, painting, plastic skin, over-saturated, distorted face, changed identity, different person, body horror

maskPolicy.note: Phase-1 limitation: mask is NOT wired into the ComfyUI API workflow (realism-pro.api.json has no mask/LoadMask node). If a mask is provided, it is uploaded to ComfyUI but only used for the final Photoshop placement mask — it does NOT guide or limit the generation area. A future phase should either add a real mask path to the workflow or remove mask upload for this variant.
